math/ulp.name: ulp
math/ulp.description: Return the value of the least significant bit of the float x: If x is a NaN (not a number), return x. If x is negative, return ulp(-x). If x is a positive infinity, return x. If x is equal to zero, return the smallest positive denormalized representable float (smaller than the minimum positive normalized float, sys.float_info.min). If x is equal to the largest positive representable float, return the value of the least significant bit of x, such that the first float smaller than x is x - ulp(...
